subcodes.first_line: O Most Exalted Pen! Make mention of him who hath turned towards the All-Glorious Horizon, when there came unto the heaven of the Cause He Who conquered all who dwell therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم الاعلی ان اذکر من توجه الی الافق الابهی اذ اتی سماء الامر بسلطان غلب من فی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
